commands.review_summary:
The branch clarifies `gog auth import` help/docs so refresh-token sources are required, access-token sources are optional additions, and the missing-refresh-token error has focused coverage.

Reproducibility: not applicable. This PR clarifies existing CLI help and generated docs rather than reporting a failing runtime bug. Source inspection confirms current main already requires a refresh-token source before optional access-token import.
